{{Quote|I see myself as a Transformer who got a wonderful ''Star Wars'' gig.|Gregg Berger, on his roles in Transformers and as Kalani|<ref name="SWI198">[[Star Wars Insider 198|''Star Wars Insider'' 198]]</ref>}}
'''Gregg Berger''' is an American voice actor who voiced [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] in the video games ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Jedi Power Battles]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Obi-Wan]]''. He also voiced [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] in ''Jedi Power Battles'', and provides the voices of various characters in other ''Star Wars'' games. He voiced [[Kalani]] in ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' and ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]''. He is best known for the voice of Grimlock in [[Wikipedia:The Transformers (TV series)|''The Transformers'']] animated series.

==''Star Wars'' works==
{{Mediacat|soundcat=Audio files of Gregg Berger}}
*[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]] – [[B1-series battle droid|Battle Droid]], [[Senate Guard/Legends|Coruscant Guard]], [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]], [[Mat Rags/Legends|Mat Rags]], Race Fan
*[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] – [[Wan Sandage/Legends|Wan Sandage]], [[Cy Yunga]]
*''[[Star Wars: Episode I Jedi Power Battles]]'' – [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]], [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]]
*''[[Star Wars: Obi-Wan]]'' – [[Battle droid/Legends|Battle droid]], [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]], Male Citizen 2
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' – [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] trooper
*''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]'' – [[Tzidik Wrantojo]], [[Wan Sandage Jr.]]
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' – Bespin Cop 1, [[Shadowtrooper]] 1, [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] 2
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' – Alien thug #1, Senator [[Trell]], Wounded man
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' – Additional Voices
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' – [[Rax Joris]], Rocket trooper Officer, [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] 2, Merchant 1
*''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''
